title: Beautiful White Gift Rose - " For Your Loved One at Peace" - Gift Wrap Included | Modern Garden Hybrid Bush Rose - 3L Potted Floral Flowers
features: PERSONALISED GIFT WRAPPED ROSE – Including beautiful gift wrap and a care card, where you can add a personalised message (simply add the message to your order and we will attach it) making it an extra special and meaningful present. The care card also includes detailed instructions on how to nurture and enjoy the roses for years to come. Disclaimer: Packaging and product appearance may vary slightly from images due to seasonal availability or supplier updates.

BEAUTIFUL WHITE BUSH ROSE: The Greenbrokers Modern Garden Hybrid Bush Rose is a stunning 3L potted plant that blooms from May to September, making it a perfect, long-lasting gift for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, memorials, and more.
REPEAT FLOWERING & EASY TO GROW: Enjoy continuous blooms throughout the season, and thrives in well-drained soil and a sunny, open spot, growing up to 90cm tall and 60cm wide.
IDEAL FOR GARDENS & PATIOS: Unlike cut flowers, this living plant can be grown in pots, borders, or flower beds, bringing lasting beauty to any outdoor space.
EASY PLANTING & CARE: Simply dig a hole twice the pot size, mix in compost and fertilizer, plant at soil level, and water thoroughly for healthy growth.
